title: How Alex Hormozi ACTUALLY Uses AI
summary: Austin Marchese analyzes Alex Hormozi's approach to AI use across his businesses, breaking down a four-pillar system: data as competitive advantage, voice-first interaction, workflow decomposition, and compound effects. Marchese highlights a critical team mistake that required company-wide correction regarding AI implementation practices.
